title: Nostalgic Crumbly Marzipan Crumble
description: An earthy and crumbly Uruguayan dish featuring a sugar-free marzipan base topped with a simple crumble of oats and nuts, perfect for dessert or snack.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine oats, almonds, walnuts, and coconut flakes. Add melted coconut oil, vanilla extract, and mix well.
Gently fold in the marzipan pieces into the oat mixture until evenly distributed.
Pour the applesauce over the top of the crumble mixture and gently stir to incorporate.
Transfer the mixture onto a baking dish lined with parchment paper. Use a spatula or spoon to spread it out evenly.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown and crisp on top.
Allow to cool before slicing into portions.
Serve warm or at room temperature as a dessert or snack.
